cards.title: Register with Gauteng Tourism Authority
cards.desc: Complete tourism operator registration with the provincial authority

cards.title: Obtain public liability insurance
cards.desc: Secure minimum R10 million public liability cover and per-trip insurance

cards.title: Obtain BBBEE certification
cards.desc: Apply for and obtain Level 4 or better BBBEE status for corporate client eligibility

cards.title: Recruit and onboard cultural guides
cards.desc: Onboard Praveen (Fordsburg heritage) and Thandi's grandmother (Soweto stories)

cards.title: Register guides with Dept of Tourism
cards.desc: Ensure Praveen and other cultural guides are registered with the Department of Tourism

cards.title: Upskill drivers in hospitality
cards.desc: Train existing drivers in hospitality, cultural narrative delivery, and guest interaction

cards.title: Set up safety and compliance protocols
cards.desc: Equip vehicles with first aid kits, establish emergency protocols, brief all staff

cards.title: Design and develop website
cards.desc: Build mobile-optimised website with experience descriptions, pricing, and instant booking

cards.title: Set up payment gateway
cards.desc: Integrate online credit card and foreign currency card processing

cards.title: Set up WhatsApp Business
cards.desc: Configure WhatsApp Business for quick enquiries and last-minute bookings

cards.title: Build automated email confirmations
cards.desc: Create automated booking confirmation emails with itinerary, driver name, pick-up time

cards.title: Build automated feedback surveys
cards.desc: Create post-experience automated feedback loop with NPS tracking

cards.title: Set up AI itinerary generation
cards.desc: Configure generative AI tools for personalised itinerary creation

cards.title: Set up AI multi-language comms
cards.desc: Configure AI tools for translating guest communications and marketing materials

cards.title: Set up expense tracking
cards.desc: Implement financial tracking for per-trip costs, margins, and commission payments

cards.title: Create corporate invoicing process
cards.desc: Establish invoicing workflow for corporate accounts with 30-day terms

cards.title: Implement dynamic pricing model
cards.desc: Build pricing rules for peak-period surcharges (15-25%) during G20 and conferences

cards.title: Develop "The Mandela Legacy" itinerary
cards.desc: Constitutional Hill → Mandela House → Saxon Hotel high tea, with timing and routes

cards.title: Develop "Johannesburg After Dark" itinerary
cards.desc: Randlords rooftop sunset → Maboneng arts district → live jazz venue

cards.title: Develop "The Spice Route" itinerary
cards.desc: Oriental Plaza spice market → Fordsburg walking tour → family restaurant dinner

cards.title: Conduct dry runs of experiences
cards.desc: Test each signature experience end-to-end, including timing and logistics

cards.title: Establish contingency plans
cards.desc: Develop backup options for weather events, venue closures, and traffic disruptions

cards.title: Negotiate venue access agreements
cards.desc: Secure group entry rates at Constitutional Hill, Mandela House, and other venues

cards.title: Negotiate restaurant partnerships
cards.desc: Agree set menu pricing and availability with Fordsburg restaurant and food vendors

cards.title: Establish hotel concierge partnerships
cards.desc: Onboard concierge desks at Saxon, Four Seasons, Fairlawns, Sandton Sun, Radisson Blu

cards.title: Host concierge familiarisation experiences
cards.desc: Invite concierge staff from 5 target hotels on complimentary ACE outings

cards.title: Build embassy & consulate relationships
cards.desc: Engage protocol teams at key embassies (G20 member nations) for delegate bookings

cards.title: Approach conference organisers
cards.desc: Partner with Sandton Convention Centre for delegate welcome packs and social programmes

cards.title: Commission photography
cards.desc: Engage Boitumelo for professional photography of experiences and venues

cards.title: Design marketing materials
cards.desc: Create brochures, experience descriptions, and hotel concierge desk inserts

cards.title: Set up Instagram Business profile
cards.desc: Create and configure Instagram with initial content and visual storytelling

cards.title: Set up LinkedIn company page
cards.desc: Create LinkedIn presence for corporate credibility and B2B engagement

cards.title: Create social media content calendar
cards.desc: Plan recurring content themes, posting schedule, and engagement strategy

cards.title: Set up TripAdvisor & Google Business
cards.desc: Create business listings for review collection and online visibility

cards.title: Corporate sales outreach campaign
cards.desc: Direct engagement with corporate travel managers and PAs for accounts

cards.title: Launch marketing campaign
cards.desc: Coordinated launch across website, social media, hotel concierges, corporate channels

cards.title: Set up referral programme
cards.desc: Design commission/incentive structure for concierges and corporate referrals

cards.title: Implement mystery-guest reviews
cards.desc: Establish periodic quality audits using anonymous mystery-guest reviews

cards.title: Set up NPS tracking & review management
cards.desc: Implement Net Promoter Score tracking and online review response workflow

risks.desc: Concierge adoption rate lower than expected — hotels may be slow to recommend an unproven operator
risks.mitigation: Invest in familiarisation experiences, ensure prompt commission payments, build direct booking channels as fallback

risks.desc: Safety incident during an experience — injury, vehicle accident, or security event
risks.mitigation: Maintain R10M insurance, enforce strict vehicle maintenance, equip first aid kits, establish emergency protocols

risks.desc: Guide availability or reliability — Praveen or Thandi's grandmother unavailable for a booking
risks.mitigation: Build pool of backup guides, cross-train team members on key narratives, maintain flexible scheduling

risks.desc: Seasonal demand fluctuations — low periods between conferences and peak travel seasons
risks.mitigation: Implement dynamic pricing, target corporate retainers for baseline revenue, diversify conference partnerships

risks.desc: Venue access disrupted — closures, renovations, or changed terms at key experience locations
risks.mitigation: Maintain contingency venues for each itinerary, design flexible routes with alternative stops

risks.desc: Negative online review or reputation damage — a poor experience amplified on TripAdvisor or Google
risks.mitigation: Implement rapid response protocol, send proactive feedback surveys, conduct mystery-guest quality audits

risks.desc: Cash flow pressure during ramp-up — fixed costs exceed revenue before booking volume builds
risks.mitigation: Leverage existing transport business revenue, minimise fixed costs, maintain contingency fund, target Month 6 break-even

risks.desc: Regulatory changes to tourism registration requirements
risks.mitigation: Monitor regulatory environment proactively, maintain relationships with Gauteng Tourism Authority

risks.desc: Competition from established tour operators entering the premium niche
risks.mitigation: Differentiate on authenticity and personal connections, leverage AI for bespoke experiences, protect community relationships

risks.desc: Traffic and logistics delays affecting experience quality
risks.mitigation: Use AI-assisted route optimisation, build buffer time into itineraries, maintain flexible scheduling

milestones.name: Tourism Registration & Compliance Complete
milestones.desc: All regulatory registrations finalised (Gauteng Tourism Authority, guide registrations, BBBEE certification)

milestones.name: Insurance & Safety Protocols in Place
milestones.desc: R10M public liability cover obtained, vehicles equipped, emergency protocols established

milestones.name: Website & Booking System Live
milestones.desc: Fully functional website with online booking, payment processing, and automated confirmations

milestones.name: All 3 Signature Experiences Designed & Tested
milestones.desc: Mandela Legacy, Johannesburg After Dark, and The Spice Route itineraries completed with dry runs

milestones.name: Hotel Concierge Partnerships Established
milestones.desc: Concierge relationships active at all 5 target hotels with brochures placed

milestones.name: Concierge Familiarisation Experiences Hosted
milestones.desc: Concierge staff from target hotels have completed complimentary ACE outings

milestones.name: Marketing Assets & Channels Ready
milestones.desc: Website, social media, brochures, photography, and corporate sales materials all live

milestones.name: Launch Day — First Experience Delivered
milestones.desc: First paid cultural experience delivered successfully to a real guest
